CM02 to CM00 orientation: normal vs rotated cameras¶

Both camera orientations need the same first two steps (reslice top + flip V). Normal orientation needs an additional reslice (left) that rotated does not.

ImageJ numpy
normal Reslice (Top) > Flip V > Reslice (Left) transpose(1,0,2) > flip(1) > transpose(2,0,1)
rotated Reslice (Top) > Flip V transpose(1,0,2) > flip(1)
In [ ]:
from pathlib import Path

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
from scipy.ndimage import zoom

from isoview.io import read_xml_metadata

def resample_iso(vol, spacing_zyx, target):
    factors = tuple(s / target for s in spacing_zyx)
    return zoom(vol, factors, order=1)

def show_mips(vol, spacing_zyx, title, axes_row, target_sp):
    vol_iso = resample_iso(vol, spacing_zyx, target_sp)
    for ax, (proj, name) in zip(axes_row, [
        (vol_iso.max(axis=0), "XY"),
        (vol_iso.max(axis=1), "XZ"),
        (vol_iso.max(axis=2), "YZ"),
    ]):
        vmax = np.percentile(proj, 99.9)
        ax.imshow(proj, cmap="gray", vmin=0, vmax=vmax, aspect="equal")
        ax.set_title(name, fontsize=8)
        ax.tick_params(labelsize=6)
    axes_row[0].set_ylabel(title, fontsize=8, rotation=0, ha="right", va="center")

Load both datasets¶

In [ ]:
normal_dir = Path(r"E:\datasets\2026-02-26_194nm.Beads.Camera.Orientations\timelapse_normal\Beads_Stage_CMs-Normal-Orientation_Unstructured_20260226_170105")
rotated_dir= Path(r"E:\datasets\2026-02-26_194nm.Beads.Camera.Orientations\timelapse_rotated\Beads_Stage_CMs-Rotated-Orientation_Unstructured_20260226_164415")

camera_channel = {0: 0, 1: 0, 2: 1, 3: 1}
cameras = [0, 1, 2, 3]
timepoint = 0

def load_stacks(input_dir):
    xml_path = next(input_dir.glob("*.xml"))
    meta = read_xml_metadata(xml_path)
    dims = meta["dimensions"]
    w, h = int(dims[0, 0]), int(dims[0, 1])
    px = meta.get("pixel_size_um", 6.5 / 16)
    zs = meta.get("z_step", 6.22)
    vols = {}
    for cam in cameras:
        chn = camera_channel[cam]
        f = input_dir / f"SPC00_TM{timepoint:05d}_ANG000_CM{cam}_CHN{chn:02d}_PH0.stack"
        d = f.stat().st_size // (2 * w * h)
        vols[cam] = np.fromfile(str(f), dtype=np.uint16).reshape((d, h, w))
        print(f"  CM{cam}: {vols[cam].shape} from {f.name}")
    return vols, px, zs

print("normal:")
norm_vols, px, zs = load_stacks(normal_dir)
print("rotated:")
rot_vols, _, _ = load_stacks(rotated_dir)
print(f"\npixel_xy: {px:.4f} um, z_step: {zs:.3f} um")

# for resampling to isotropic
target_sp = px * 2
raw_sp = (zs, px, px)
sp_reslice_top = (px, zs, px)
sp_reslice_both = (px, px, zs)

normal:
  CM0: (224, 2048, 1792) from SPC00_TM00000_ANG000_CM0_CHN00_PH0.stack
  CM1: (224, 2048, 1792) from SPC00_TM00000_ANG000_CM1_CHN00_PH0.stack
  CM2: (224, 2048, 1792) from SPC00_TM00000_ANG000_CM2_CHN01_PH0.stack
  CM3: (224, 2048, 1792) from SPC00_TM00000_ANG000_CM3_CHN01_PH0.stack
rotated:
  CM0: (224, 2048, 1792) from SPC00_TM00000_ANG000_CM0_CHN00_PH0.stack
  CM1: (224, 2048, 1792) from SPC00_TM00000_ANG000_CM1_CHN00_PH0.stack
  CM2: (224, 2048, 1792) from SPC00_TM00000_ANG000_CM2_CHN01_PH0.stack
  CM3: (224, 2048, 1792) from SPC00_TM00000_ANG000_CM3_CHN01_PH0.stack

pixel_xy: 0.4062 um, z_step: 3.250 um

CM02 → CM00¶

  • normal: transpose(1,0,2) > flip(1) > transpose(2,0,1)
  • rotated: transpose(1,0,2) > flip(1)
In [ ]:
norm_cm2 = np.flip(norm_vols[2].transpose(1, 0, 2), axis=1).transpose(2, 0, 1).copy()
rot_cm2 = np.flip(rot_vols[2].transpose(1, 0, 2), axis=1).copy()
In [36]:
# --- CM02 -> CM00: normal ---
fig1, ax1 = plt.subplots(3, 3, figsize=(16, 9))
fig1.suptitle("Normal: CM02 → CM00", fontsize=14, fontweight="bold", y=1.0)
show_mips(norm_vols[0], raw_sp,          "CM00 reference", ax1[0], target_sp)
show_mips(norm_vols[2], raw_sp,          "CM02 raw",       ax1[1], target_sp)
show_mips(norm_cm2,     sp_reslice_both, "CM02 oriented",  ax1[2], target_sp)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [37]:
fig2, ax2 = plt.subplots(3, 3, figsize=(16, 9))
fig2.suptitle("Rotated: CM02 → CM00", fontsize=14, fontweight="bold", y=1.0)
show_mips(rot_vols[0], raw_sp,         "CM00 reference", ax2[0], target_sp)
show_mips(rot_vols[2], raw_sp,         "CM02 raw",       ax2[1], target_sp)
show_mips(rot_cm2,     sp_reslice_top, "CM02 oriented",  ax2[2], target_sp)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
